title: datawhalechina/hello-agents teaches agent building from first principles
friendlyTitle: Hello-Agents is a free course for learning AI agents
summary: Hello-Agents is a structured, free learning project covering AI agent theory, ReAct-style patterns, low-code platforms, agent frameworks, memory, RAG, context engineering, protocols, evaluation, and practical multi-agent projects. It includes code, tutorials, and complete learning paths.
friendlySummary: This GitHub project teaches how AI agents work and how to build them, with lessons, examples, and practical projects.
whyItMatters: Use it as a curriculum for moving from basic LLM usage to building agent systems with memory, tools, evaluation, and multi-agent workflows. It is particularly useful for teams that need shared foundations before adopting agent platforms.
friendlyWhyItMatters: It can help developers and teams learn the basics before they build or buy agent systems.
